meta.defaultDescription: Municipal ski area in Shichinohe, Aomori. Live operations, snow, access, and course information.

home.transitTitle: A local ski hill close to the Shinkansen
home.transitBody: Easy access from Shichinohe-Towada Station on the Tohoku Shinkansen. Choose your experience—from powder runs to family-friendly slopes.
home.planBody: Purpose-built pages for different visit styles.
home.transitImageAlt: Shinkansen and snowy mountains — transit resort imagery

audience.title: Choose your adventure
audience.powderBody: Un groomed upper mountain. For riders seeking quieter snow.
audience.familyBody: Gentle slopes, lessons, and night skiing. A welcoming area for first-timers.

guides.transitPowderSummary: Powder days within easy reach of the station.
guides.transitShinkansenSummary: A short ski trip built around the Tohoku Shinkansen.
guides.beginnersSummary: Gentle runs and tips for families and first-time visitors.

liveCams.title: Live cameras
liveCams.description: Live views from the resort. Streams will appear here once camera systems are installed.
liveCams.defaultPlaceholder: Cameras are being installed. Video will appear once broadcasting starts.

today.title: Today's operations & snow
today.description: Latest snow depth, snowfall, and lift operations for Shichinohe Town Ski Area (updates after launch).
today.shellDescription: Only resort-verified information is shown once operations begin. Times and figures may change.
today.heroLead: Check today's snow and operations status first.

access.title: Access
access.description: How to reach Shichinohe Town Ski Area from Shichinohe-Towada Station on the Tohoku Shinkansen (confirm fares and times officially).
access.shellDescription: Transit times and fares change by season and schedule. Always confirm with operators and official sources.

map.heroHeadline: {minutes} min by taxi from Shichinohe-Towada Station
map.heroSub: From Michi-no-Eki Shichinohe to the slopes. Buttons open your phone's map or taxi apps.
map.goTaxiNote: GO opens the official app store or website. Set your pickup near the station in the app.
map.sourceNote: Source: Shichinohe tourism Tabikura. Travel time varies with road conditions.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact details and how to reach the resort.
contact.shellDescription: Phone and online contact options are being prepared. For urgent matters, check official resort channels.

news.title: News
news.description: Latest updates from Shichinohe Town Ski Area.
news.shellDescription: Content is being prepared for the initial public launch.

ticketsRental.title: Tickets & rental
ticketsRental.description: Lift tickets, rental gear, and payment methods will be posted as confirmed.
ticketsRental.shellDescription: Ticket types, rental scope, and payment options will be updated after official confirmation.

lessonsEvents.title: Lessons & events
lessonsEvents.description: School programs and event schedules will be posted as confirmed.
lessonsEvents.shellDescription: Lessons, free night sessions, and events will be published after official confirmation.

stayLocal.title: Around the resort
stayLocal.description: Hot springs, dining, and stay ideas—posted after official verification.
stayLocal.shellDescription: Nearby onsen, food, and sample itineraries will be added once hours and partnerships are confirmed.

liftDeals.title: Lift deals & partners
liftDeals.description: Partner offers for lift tickets and travel products (with required ad disclosures at launch).
liftDeals.shellDescription: Discount lift tickets and travel bundles will be listed with clear terms and promotional labeling.

beginnersHiddenGem.title: Beginners Hidden Gem
beginnersHiddenGem.metaDescription: Preparation page for families and first-timers—gentle slopes, lessons, and local tips.
beginnersHiddenGem.shellDescription: Landing-page skeleton for newcomers: safe routes, lessons, and nearby experiences.
beginnersHiddenGem.lead: Draft page. At launch: gentle-slope map, lesson booking, and family tips will be added.

transitShinkansen.title: Transit Shinkansen
transitShinkansen.metaDescription: For Shinkansen travelers—short trips and stopover-style visits to the resort.
transitShinkansen.shellDescription: LP skeleton for rail access, time-boxed visits, and links to live operations.
transitShinkansen.lead: Draft page. At launch: timetables, travel time, and day-of checklist will be added.

transitPowder.title: Transit Powder
transitPowder.metaDescription: For riders seeking powder with minimal transfer friction from the station.
transitPowder.shellDescription: High-intent LP for powder days: shorter access, operations check, and run guidance.
transitPowder.lead: Draft page. At launch: run picks, snow guide, and day-of flow will be added.

common.loadingMessage: Loading… First visit may take about 10 seconds.

coursesPage.intro: Use the map above for live lift and trail status. The list below has distance, grade, and surface details for each run.
coursesPage.sectionDescription: Per-run distance, grade, and surface details will be posted after official confirmation.

page.title: Resort map
page.description: Live lift and trail status on the terrain map. For distance and grade, see the course guide.
